base_url.description: Full Magento REST base URL including the API version prefix, e.g. https://magento.mystore.com/rest/V1. Legacy derives this from store_host + api_version at request time; this bundle requires the fully composed URL directly (see docs.md Known limits).

api_key.description: Adobe Commerce (Magento) Integration Access Token. Sent as a Bearer token; never logged.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects updated at or after this time are read (filtered on updated_at).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
